Interface IComputeChangeFunctionArguments3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control Compute Change function arguments.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1949C314-0B16-45DA-8B22-FAC76C1D3474")]
public interface IComputeChangeFunctionArguments3 : IComputeChangeFunctionArguments2, IComputeChangeFunctionArguments
